note: Add every completed demo here after it's built. This registry is checked BEFORE building anything new. A match means we customize an existing solution rather than building from scratch — saving hours. Partial matches mean we can use components. source field: 'manual' = built outside the deploy tool (no URL expected), 'demo_tool' = auto-deployed by deploy.py (Railway URL available).

solutions.name: Example Solution Name
solutions.description: One-line description of what this demo does.

solutions.name: Another Solution (manual/no URL)
solutions.note: Built outside deploy tool — contact team for demo

matching_rules.full_match: 3+ keywords match AND demo_type matches → reuse and customize
matching_rules.partial_match: 1-2 keywords match OR components are reusable → use as starting point
matching_rules.no_match: Build new → add to registry when done
matching_rules.status_filter: Only use solutions with status: built or in_progress (not planned)

pipeline_stages.discovery: First meeting to understand the problem — demo pipeline applies
pipeline_stages.demo: Showing the solution — demo already exists or being built
pipeline_stages.contract: Negotiating terms — demo pipeline does NOT apply
pipeline_stages.other: Check context — may not need demo pipeline at all
